tagline: Earth-born Kala Cotton, woven by hand in Kutch
metaDescription: Direct-from-loom Kala cotton apparel and handwoven fabric from Faradi village, Kutch. Bhujodi extra-weft weaving, natural plant dyes, zero irrigation cotton.
footerNote: Direct from the loom in Faradi village, Kutch — no middlemen, no mass production.
wholesaleBlurb: We work with a limited number of sustainable fashion brands on bulk fabric sourcing. If you're a brand interested in Kala cotton or Bhujodi handloom textiles at scale, write to us with your requirements.
